ega_username.ui:help: Your registered EGA account email address

ega_password.ui:help: Your EGA account password. Stored only long enough to build the pyega3 credentials file; removed from the Nextflow params log before the workflow starts.

accession_list_file.ui:help: Upload a text file with EGA accessions, one per line. Both dataset IDs (EGAD*) and file IDs (EGAF*) are supported.

connections.ui:help: Number of parallel connections pyega3 opens per file. Higher values speed up large downloads but are more likely to be throttled.

max_file_size.ui:help: Allocate disk space based on the largest expected file. Larger values allow bigger files but may increase costs.

form.title: EGA Download
form.description: Download EGA data using pyega3 with username/password authentication

ega_username.title: EGA Username (email)
ega_username.description: Your registered EGA account email address

accession_list_file.title: Accession List File
accession_list_file.description: Upload a text file (.txt) containing EGA accessions, one per line (EGAD* or EGAF*)

connections.title: Parallel Connections
connections.description: Number of parallel connections pyega3 opens per file download (1-20)

max_file_size.title: Max Expected File Size (GB)
max_file_size.description: Maximum expected size for a single EGA file. Determines the disk space allocated per task (50-1000 GB)
